arts.ttl: Leeds United have major double suspension worry hanging over today’s QPR clash
arts.sum: Leeds United have two players currently walking a tightrope over a yellow card suspension this week, Joe Rodon and Willy Gnonto . Joe Rodon and Willy Gnonto sit on four yellow cards as things stand and are therefore one away from an automatic suspension.

arts.ttl: Leeds United will be hoping double curse strikes on promotion rivals Sunderland today
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke was beaten to the October Manager of the Month award in the Championship by Sunderland’s Regis Le Bris, but sometimes that prize is more a curse than a blessing. Daniel Farke pipped to Championship Manager of the Month by Regis Le Bris

arts.ttl: Ex-Swansea City and Leeds United coach defends actions after grabbing own player
arts.sum: Pep Clotet was appointed head coach of Italian side Triestina last month but his tenure has already been marred by an extraordinary incident during Friday's defeat

arts.ttl: Junior Firpo banned for 3 games - Proof revealed
arts.sum: Leeds United left-back Junior Firpo has been slapped with a three-match ban following a headbutt on Millwall’s Danny McNamara. As Leeds prepare to face QPR, they won’t be able to call upon Junior Firpo, who has been handed an FA ban following an incident late in the defeat at the New Den.

arts.ttl: Leeds United 25/26 away kit and third kit leaks
arts.sum: The kit is expected to be predominantly blue with a white detailing, while also possibly paying homage to the iconic ‘Strongbow’ kit worn between 2001-2003 in the Premier League. A report from Footy Headlines this week has revealed that Leeds’ away kit for the 25/26 season will deviate for the current yellow scheme.

arts.ttl: 'What I criticised a little' Leeds United man showing too much of a good thing
arts.sum: “Also, with him, what I criticised a little bit: he had a great shooting position out of 14 yards and if their centre-back is able, with one chance, with one touch, to score a goal, I want my number 10 to be there with a better-concentrated finish. Daniel Farke feels if the American can slow down and use his energy more wisely, he could play at the highest level.

arts.ttl: Leeds United can hit back at 'bottle-job' critics after embarrassment vs QPR
arts.sum: Leeds United host Queens Park Rangers in a 3pm kick-off at Elland Road this afternoon, with the chance to climb the Championship table. Daniel Farke hosts a Marti Cifuentes side on the back of a 10-match winless streak that includes five draws and five losses.

arts.ttl: Angry ex-Leeds United coach grabs player by the neck and shakes him after red card
arts.sum: Pep Clotet felt his side showed commitment and fight despite being a man down, but ultimately paid the price for a lack of game management. The Spanish manager, recently appointed by Triestina who are currently languishing at the bottom of Italy's third tier with only one win in their first 14 games of the season, saw his side lose 1-0 at home to Giana Erminio on Friday night.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for QPR as Daniel Farke hits back at Elland Road critics
arts.sum: By joining the Leeds United community on WhatsApp, you'll see the biggest and best stories as soon as they happen. Leeds United squad vs QPR: Meslier, Darlow, Cairns, Byram, Bogle, Struijk, Rodon, Struijk, Firpo, Schmidt, James, Gnonto, Rothwell, Tanaka, Guilavogui, Crew, Solomon, Aaronson, Piroe, Joseph, Bamford, Gelhardt.

arts.ttl: QPR star that tore Leeds United’s 23/24 promotion hopes to shreds won’t play today
arts.sum: Leeds United host QPR tomorrow for the first time since the R’s inflicted a damning 4-0 loss on the Whites in the promotion run-in back in April. Ilias Chair ruled out of Leeds United v QPR with injury
